# host_keymap (Resource)

Manages the system virtual console keymap.

This resource uses `localectl` and is intended for Linux hosts with systemd. Destroying the resource removes it from Terraform state and leaves the live keymap unchanged.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_keymap" "console" {
  name = "us"
}
```

## Import

Import the current keymap by name:

```shell
terraform import host_keymap.console us
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Virtual console keymap name, such as `us` or `jp106`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `name`.
